privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the standard iDempiere GardenWorld demo database (synthetic seed data). I extracted and parsed the official Adempiere_pg.dmp seed database from the iDempiere Docker image and explicitly verified that the target pricelist Export 2003 has ID 105 and references pricelist 103. The customer Patio Fun, Inc. corresponds to business partner ID 121. The target products (Patio Chair, Patio Table, Patio Sun Screen) correspond to IDs 133, 134, and 135. The expected price updates ($32.00, $65.00, $21.50) and order quantities (20, 8, 12) strictly match both the task description and the explicit scoring logic in verifier.py. The original standard prices (30.69, 61.36, 20.45) in the demo database were successfully retrieved to confirm the values are intended to be modified.
